decks.name: Java Fundamentals
decks.description: Variables, methods, conditions, loops and basic Java syntax.

cards.question: What is the difference between == and equals() in Java?
cards.answer: The == operator compares primitive values or object references, while equals() normally compares object content.

cards.question: What is method overloading?
cards.answer: Method overloading means declaring multiple methods with the same name but different parameter lists.

cards.question: What does the final keyword do?
cards.answer: It can prevent reassignment of variables, overriding of methods, or inheritance from classes.

decks.name: Spring Boot
decks.description: Core Spring Boot concepts, dependency injection and configuration.

cards.question: What is dependency injection?
cards.answer: Dependency injection means supplying an object's dependencies from outside instead of creating them inside the object.

decks.name: Private Revision Notes
decks.description: Personal topics that require additional revision.

cards.question: Which topic should I revise next?
cards.answer: Review transaction management and entity relationships.
